name: DeepEMhancer
description: Perform post processing, including local sharpening and automatic masking/denoising, of cryoEM maps given input raw volumes, preferably half maps. Deep learning model trained on pairs of experimental volumes and atomic model-corrected volumes. Post-translational modifications and ligands were not included in the traning set and may be inaccurate.
capabilities: Perform post processing, including local sharpening and automatic masking/denoising, of cryoEM maps given input raw volumes, preferably half maps
Deep learning model trained on pairs of experimental volumes and atomic model-corrected volumes
Post-translational modifications and ligands were not included in the traning set and may be inaccurate

half_map_1.description: First half map from cryo-EM reconstruction (.mrc)

half_map_2.description: Second half map from cryo-EM reconstruction (.mrc)

full_map.description: Full cryo-EM density map if half maps are not available (.mrc)
